## Type of change

- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] perf (performance)
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore
- [ ] test
- [ ] ci

## Related issue

Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows conventional commits: `type(scope): description (#issue)` — enforced by `pr-title` CI
- [ ] At least one approving review before merge (see `WORKFLOW_GUIDE.md`)
- [ ] Use **Squash and merge** so the PR title becomes the commit on `main` — release-please reads those commits to bump the version
- [ ] CI passes
- [ ] Self-reviewed
